creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: antoine
Date: Wed Feb  5 18:16:18 2014
New Revision: 261521
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/base/261521

Log:
  Add files to remove WITHOUT_NIS

Modified:

Modified: head/tools/build/mk/OptionalObsoleteFiles.inc
==============================================================================

 .endif
